mapper.sql: id, user_id, agent_id, session_id, memory_type, content, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO long_term_memory (user_id, agent_id, session_id, memory_type, content, metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (CAST(#{userId} AS uuid),
CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid) NULL ,
CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid) NULL , #{memoryType}, #{content}, CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), #{embedding}::vector, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM long_term_memory WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)

SELECT
FROM long_term_memory WHERE user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid)
AND memory_type = #{memoryType}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE long_term_memory
memory_type = #{memoryType},
content = #{content},
metadata = CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb),
embedding = #{embedding}::vector,
agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid),
session_id = CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid),
updated_at = #{updatedAt}
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM long_term_memory WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
